Store_ID: Unique identifier for each Lee's Market store
Location: Geographical location of the Lee's Market store
Year: The fiscal year for which the data is representative
Average_Checkout_Counters: The average number of checkout counters operated by the Lee's Market store for the specified year
Store_Size: Size category of the Lee's Market store such as small, medium or large
Employee_Count: Number of employees working at the Lee's Market store
